session.name: MPI-222 Phases 1-4 SHIPPED (data model + marker helpers + local drift/repair + remote drift/warn); next = Phase 5 (mpi-ci Pod image, cross-repo) then 6-7

goal.original: Continue MPI-222: node_lock pins each custom node's commit but nothing records which commit was installed and the install-check is folder-exists only (both engines), so a node bump leaves installs silently stale. Fix = per-node commit marker + drift check + targeted reinstall on boot, NO engine wipe. Plus remote node-install architecture change so a node bump never forces a Pod image rebuild. After implementation: update rules/docs/memory and remove dead code (the installOnEngine flag). Track ALL code + doc/rule/memory/skill/playbook/command changes in a ledger file so nothing drifts at close-out.
goal.summary: Phases 1-4 of the 7-phase plan are DONE and self-verified (local half fully; remote half logic-verified + guard-tested, live-gated on a Pod). node-drift.test.cjs = 12/12. A change-ledger file (changelog.md) tracks every code change + every doc/rule/memory needing re-eval and is linked on the card. Next session executes Phase 5 (the mpi-ci Pod image â€” a SEPARATE git repo), then 6 (finish guard tests) and 7 (permission-gated docs/rules/memory sweep + dead-code).

completed: Phase 1 â€” data model: PainterI2Vadvanced pinned in node_lock (commit a044ac7b2a33565343ddc75283c94a41371b4352) + lockUrl(); installOnEngine renamed to engineAsset on the 6 WEIGHTS only, dropped from all nodes; nodeset_version removed; _doc de-staled; getUniversalWorkflowDepIds filter retargeted to (type==='custom_nodes' || engineAsset===true) = all 10 nodes + 6 weights; remote baked/volume regex pulled forward to /installRequirements:\s*true/ (baked=6, volume=4)
Phase 2 â€” routes/shared.js: getPinnedNodeCommit(depId), writeNodeCommitMarker(nodeFolder,depId), NODE_COMMIT_MARKER='.mpi_node_commit'; all exported

Phase 3 â€” LOCAL engine: marker stamped at end of _runCustomNodeInstall; checkUniversalWorkflowDepsStatus returns driftedDeps (marker mismatch OR absent); repair-deps unions missing+drifted + PRE-WIPES drifted folders before reinstall; getInstalledModelNodeDeps DELETED (all nodes universal now); LIVE pip pins captured from the running engine for Impact-Pack/kjnodes/Frame-Interpolation/Impact-Subpack (dry-run: all already-satisfied)

Phase 4 â€” REMOTE app-side: _installedNodeCommits() reads manifest nodes[] (best-effort); remoteModelsCheck VOLUME drift -> installed:false, BAKED drift -> bakedDrift[] warn-only; modelRegistry syncModelInstalled emits ui:warning toast (deduped/session); MANIFEST_SCHEMA_MAX 1->2
tests/node-drift.test.cjs â€” 12/12 (local drift/marker/pre-wipe/no-wipe + baked-pipPins + no-conflict invariants + 4 remote-drift cases)
changelog.md ledger created + linked on card (task.json links.changelog); card maturity planned->in-progress
pending: Phase 5 â€” mpi-ci Pod image (SEPARATE repo c:\AI\Mpi\mpi-ci\cubric-vision-pod\, edit with git -C): (1) resync node_lock copy (cp from Cubric-Vision); (2) Dockerfile bake loop ~L147-205 -> bake ONLY installRequirements:true nodes + write .mpi_node_commit per baked node; (3) wrapper/wrapper.py _run_node_install ~L1827-1909 -> write .mpi_node_commit on volume install + record manifest nodes[] {filename,commit,installed_at}; startup -> read baked .mpi_node_commit into manifest nodes[]; bump WRAPPER_VERSION + MANIFEST_SCHEMA_VERSION 1->2; (4) start.sh L232-246 -> remove MpiNodes git-pull hook; (5) add `commit` field to remoteInstallDep custom_nodes body (Cubric-Vision side) so wrapper can stamp it; (6) ONE image rebuild (build-pod-image skill / gh workflow run) + update the pinned image tag consumer â€” USER-GATED live op
Phase 6 â€” finish guard tests if any remote assertions need real fixtures (local + remote logic already covered by node-drift.test.cjs)

Phase 7 â€” PERMISSION-GATED docs/rules/memory sweep + dead-code: work the changelog.md 'Re-eval required' table to zero (comfy_engine.md, downloads.md, download-manager.md, runpod-remote-engine.md, add-model-playbook.md, universal_workflows.js:6 comment, engine.js:366 comment, MEMORY.md hook); grep-clean installOnEngine everywhere

next_action.description: Read the plan + changelog.md, then start Phase 5 (mpi-ci Pod image â€” SEPARATE git repo at c:\AI\Mpi\mpi-ci, edit with git -C, never git add from Cubric-Vision). FIRST sub-task: resync the build node_lock copy (cp c:/AI/Mpi/Cubric-Vision/dev_configs/node_lock.json c:/AI/Mpi/mpi-ci/cubric-vision-pod/node_lock.json) so it diff-cleans (picks up MpiNodes 2d409b5, RES4LYF, the PainterI2Vadvanced pin, and the dropped installOnEngine flag). Then Dockerfile bake-split + markers, wrapper.py markers + manifest nodes[] + schema/version bump, start.sh MpiNodes git-pull removal, and add the `commit` field to remoteInstallDep's custom_nodes body on the Cubric-Vision side. The ONE image rebuild + live Pod verification is USER-GATED â€” do the repo edits, then stop and ask before rebuilding. Log every change into changelog.md.

key_decisions: Change-ledger file changelog.md is the anti-drift mechanism the USER asked for: every code change + every doc/rule/memory/skill/playbook/command needing re-eval goes in it, so Phase 7 closes them ALL out (nothing forgotten). Linked on the card. Update it as each phase lands.

Bake discriminator = installRequirements (pip-nodes BAKED in Pod image for venv determinism; code-only nodes VOLUME-install on connect). baked=6 (LTXVideo, Impact-Pack, kjnodes, Frame-Interpolation, Impact-Subpack, RES4LYF), volume=4 (MpiNodes, Painter, VHS, UltimateSDUpscale). MpiNodes (highest churn) is now rebuild-free.

installOnEngine RENAMED to engineAsset, kept ONLY on the 6 universal WEIGHTS. All nodes dropped it. getUniversalWorkflowDepIds now selects (type==='custom_nodes' || engineAsset===true) â€” ALL nodes are universal (this is why getInstalledModelNodeDeps could be deleted).
Marker .mpi_node_commit mirrors .mpi_engine_version (plain UTF-8 trimmed commit). Stamped LAST in the install (after reqs+pins) so it's a success sentinel.

Drift two outcomes: VOLUME node drifted/missing -> reinstall (local: pre-wipe + repair-deps; remote: installed:false -> existing install path). BAKED node drifted -> WARN ONLY (ui:warning toast, once/session), never volume-heal.
Remote fail-safe: absent manifest nodes[] (old wrapper / pre-Phase-5) -> NO drift reported -> zero false reinstalls/warns. Makes Phase 4 harmless until Phase 5 ships the wrapper data.
LIVE pip pins captured from the user's RUNNING engine (they were mid-generation) and verified already-satisfied via pip --dry-run â€” the proven-good set, not guessed.

Verify mode = user-ux: local half self-verified; remote half needs a real Pod from the Phase-5 image (feedback_runpod_not_local_engine_proof) â€” ship remote logic-verified + guard-tested, card the live check.
constraints: mpi-ci is a SEPARATE git repo (c:\AI\Mpi\mpi-ci). Edit with git -C c:\AI\Mpi\mpi-ci; NEVER git add from Cubric-Vision. Shared-tree commit hygiene: commit by explicit pathspec, never git add -A (feedback_shared_tree_commit_hygiene).
mpi-ci node_lock copy is STALE (MpiNodes 780c7c3, missing RES4LYF, no Painter, still has installOnEngine) = the bug live. Resync FIRST in Phase 5.
wrapper.py version was 0.2.32 in-file per plan (memory said 0.2.31) â€” CONFIRM before stamping the build-arg.

TRAP (already handled locally, mirror on remote): startUniversalWorkflowInstall SKIPS folders that already exist (isCompleteOnDisk) -> a drifted node (folder present) is marked complete and never reinstalled. MUST pre-wipe before repair. Local repair-deps already does this; the remote wrapper reinstall path must also remove the folder (force) for a drifted volume node.
The ONE Pod image rebuild + live verification is USER-GATED (live op). Do the mpi-ci repo edits, then STOP and ask before rebuilding.

Both engines mandatory (feedback_check_both_engine_paths). Phase 5 adds the remote DATA that Phase 4's app-side already consumes â€” they ship as a lockstep pair (MANIFEST_SCHEMA_MAX 1->2 already bumped app-side).
Phase 7 docs edits are PERMISSION-GATED â€” ask before touching .claude/rules/ or docs/.
Do NOT re-litigate locked architecture (bake=installRequirements, engineAsset, marker, drift ladder, GitHub-archive-not-R2). All settled with the user.
